# BENI Distribution Manifests

This directory is the manifest home for BENI external releases. Large dataset payloads stay on external platforms; this directory records identifiers, platform roles, and pointers to canonical docs.

## Current Public Records

| Platform | Record | Source |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Zenodo | `10.5281/zenodo.20585401` | `dataset/BENI/ZENODO_UPLOAD_MANIFEST.md` |
| Hugging Face | `huggingface.co/nabil0x` | `dataset/BENI/HUGGINGFACE.md` |
| Mendeley Data | `10.17632/v362rp78dc.4` | `dataset/BENI/MENDELEY_UPLOAD.md` |
| OSF | TODO | `dataset/BENI/OSF_UPLOAD_MANIFEST.md` |

Before adding a new platform record, complete `docs/DATA_RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md`.
